data.summary: Visionary technology executive with 20+ years of experience leading engineering organizations and driving product innovation. Proven track record of scaling engineering teams from startup to enterprise, delivering products used by millions, and building high-performing cultures. Expert in strategic planning, technical architecture, and organizational transformation.

experience.title: Vice President of Engineering
experience.description: Lead organization of 150+ engineers across 8 product teams, managing $25M+ annual engineering budget. Architected technical strategy for company's digital transformation, migrating legacy systems to cloud-native microservices architecture. Established engineering excellence programs including code review standards, technical design reviews, and career development frameworks. Reduced time-to-market by 40% through implementation of agile methodologies and CI/CD pipelines.

experience.title: Director of Engineering
experience.description: Managed team of 45 engineers responsible for core platform and infrastructure. Led migration to microservices architecture, improving system reliability from 99.0% to 99.9% uptime. Established engineering hiring process, growing team from 20 to 45 engineers. Collaborated with product and design teams to define technical roadmap and product strategy.

experience.title: Senior Engineering Manager
experience.description: Built and led engineering team from 5 to 25 engineers. Designed and implemented scalable architecture supporting rapid user growth. Established engineering culture emphasizing quality, collaboration, and continuous learning. Worked directly with founders to define product vision and technical strategy.

experience.title: Software Engineer → Engineering Manager
experience.description: Started as individual contributor, promoted to Engineering Manager in 2007. Developed enterprise software solutions for Fortune 500 clients. Led team of 8 engineers building mission-critical financial systems. Managed client relationships and technical delivery for key accounts.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
